items.claim: Gable Steveson has the wrestling ability to secure a takedown and finish the fight from mount.
items.quote: there's definitely a possibility he just walks out, throws a shot, lands a takedown, gets to mount and game, set, match.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's power will increase at light heavyweight.
items.quote: I think at light heavyweight, you're going to see Whittaker's power goes up in this weight class.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov's grappling ability has slowed down.
items.quote: a karate striker with a high-level grappling game that I think has slowed
I still think Nikita Krylov's washed.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will be significantly faster than Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: I think Robert Whittaker is going to be so much faster than Nikita Krylov

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will successfully defend Nikita Krylov's takedown attempts.
items.quote: I think Whittaker's fighting those takedowns off and landing nice counter shots.

items.claim: At 35 years old, Robert Whittaker is considered young for the light heavyweight division.
items.quote: At light heavyweight, 35 is a young age, man.
